# Copilot eval corpus v1

Every transcript in this directory is synthetic. No private meeting content,
customer data, or copied conversation text is included.

The corpus covers long-turn partial synthesis, semantic partial reversal,
overlapping opportunities, silence, compact multi-thread strategy, topic-shift
grounding refresh, mode-specific filtering, and feedback-driven cadence. JSON
files are embedded in the binary for the default suite and can also be replaced
with `--fixtures DIR`.
